title: Slimecraft
description: A gentle fusion of Minecraft & Slime Rancher
body:
# ABOUT

This pack offers a nice middle ground between the worlds of Slime Rancher and Minecraft.
Nearly every part of the game is referenced in some way.

Currently included are:
- 29 Slimes
- 15 Chickens
- 28 Wiggly Paintings
- 1 Banner Pattern
- 1 Shield Pattern
- Custom Glass (All Colours)
- Custom Foods
- Fully Coloured UI
- Various Minor Tweaks



# Q/A
**The only slime is the pink one?**

This pack leverages Optifine for its random textures. Please ensure you have that installed.


**I can't find a specific slime**

The slimes spawn based on biome and world height, however if you name a slime using a name tag it will show as that slime.
(Naming a slime tabby will turn it into a tabby slime)


**When will [feature] be added?**

That is a great question. I'm a busy college student already behind in classes, so when I have time to.


**[Texture] looks bad, why?**

I'm a computer science major... art is not my expertise. I gave it a good try though.


**What's next?**

I am currently learning how to make mods, so that this pack can become a fully featured reality! Expect updates to this resource pack as well as a mod on the near-horizon!


**Secret Styles when?**

It is on my agenda, as of now I don't know which update will add them. Potentially the next, next, next update?
(No really I've planned that far out)


**Will this be updated to [version]?**

This pack will be carried forwards into future versions of Minecraft. Previous versions I'll consider but no garentees.
(Please ping me on Twitter or Instagram to remind me, I do a lot of things and may forget)


**Is this compatible with [Texture Pack]?**

My pack is very minimal and is designed to work well with others, so probably.


**How can I contact you?**

[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/sumihsus/) or [Bluesky]([https://bsky.app/profile/sushimus.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/sumihsus.bsky.social)) are good places.



# NOTE
Please don't steal the textures I worked on,
it would make me sad :(
